analysis_policy.evidence_status: untouched generated seeds, attack generators, solver settings, and decision rules frozen on main before evaluation
analysis_policy.threat_model: an admitted broad MM bundle or a tiny economically active MM bridge may deliberately join an accumulated resting book into one exact optimization component
analysis_policy.workloads: 64 markets; 10000 and 50000 accumulated retail orders; either one 384-order global MM constraint with LP-calibrated budget pressure or sixteen 24-order local constraints plus one positive-budget 64-order global bridge; every individual MM constraint fits the production 512-order submission limit
analysis_policy.primary_unit: one generated order book, calibrated budget ratio, and solver
analysis_policy.hard_gates: complete fingerprint-consistent matrix; exactly one economic component in every scored row; no panic, backend failure, timeout, empty result, verifier-invalid result, or MM-budget violation
analysis_policy.quality_gate: monolithic pacing bundle may not lose materially to RC-FW on landed retained-cash objective; material means more than max(1000 nanodollars, 1e-8 of the RC-FW objective)
analysis_policy.identity_gate: the exact-component wrapper and monolithic pacing bundle must produce identical termination, landed allocation, welfare, and retained-cash objective on every one-component pair
analysis_policy.latency_gate: monolithic pacing bundle maximum wall time must be below 3 seconds at 10000 declared retail orders and below the deployed 10-second block interval at 50000
analysis_policy.router_rule: retain exact decomposition in the production facade only if the monolithic security baseline passes and wrapper scan/routing overhead at each scale is no more than max(5 percent at paired P95, 50 milliseconds absolute); otherwise make monolithic pacing bundle the production default
analysis_policy.failure_policy: retain every panic, empty result, backend error, timeout, iteration cap, and verifier-invalid allocation
analysis_policy.seed_policy: seeds 72000 through 72301 were not used by solver development and must be evaluated once against the frozen source revision; smoke maps them to disjoint 42000-series development seeds

exact-components-pacing-bundle.label: Exact connectivity router around certified pacing bundle
